title: kohautia longifolia var. effusa
intro: Kohautia longifolia var. effusa is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family, commonly known as a type of flowering plant native to tropical regions. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Kohautia longifolia var. effusa include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage methods.
